project.component: { "keyToString": { "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "Robot.Validate Job Creation With Job Type as Rapid Contract.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify by changing items per page to 100 items, only 100 items to be displayed Pending Approval and Drafts tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify by changing items per page to 100 items, only 100 items to be displayed on open position tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify by changing items per page to 20 items, only 20 items to be displayed Pending Approval and Drafts tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify by changing items per page to 20 items, only 20 items to be displayed all jobs requisition tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify by changing items per page to 20 items, only 20 items to be displayed on open position tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify by changing items per page to 500 items, only 100 items to be displayed Pending Approval and Drafts tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify by changing items per page to 500 items, only 500 items to be displayed all jobs requisition tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify by changing items per page to 500 items, only 500 items to be displayed on open position tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify by changing page number to next page and validate items count on Pending Approval and Drafts tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify by changing page number to next page and validate items count on all jobs requisition tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify by changing page number to next page and validate items count on open position tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify by changing page number to page 2 and validate items count on open position tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify by default 50 items to be displayed on all Pending Approval and Drafts tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify by default 50 items to be displayed on all jobs requisition tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify by default 50 items to be displayed on open position tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify pagination on all the open position tab in job listing page.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify start date filter in open positions tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify start date filter in pending approval & draft tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify tag filter in all job requisitions.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify tag filter in open positions tab.executor": "Debug", "Robot.Verify that \"all job requisitions\" page lists all the jobs (Status could be - Draft, pending approval,Open, Offer Pending, offers accepted ,filled,Rejected, closed).executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that \"extension\" subtab should only show newly updated/created records in open positions tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that \"extension\" subtab should only show newly updated/created records in pending approval and drafts tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that \"new\" subtab should only show newly updated/created records in open positions tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that \"new\" subtab should only show newly updated/created records in pending approval and drafts tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that \"pending approval & Draft \" page lists the jobs created in pending approval & Draft status.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that Job Order reverts back to OPEN status for offers accepted job if a Internal talent later fails to start so the number of accepted offers is fewer than the number of open positions.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that Job Order reverts back to OPEN status for offers accepted job if a Vendor talent later fails to start so the number of accepted offers is fewer than the number of open positions.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that Job Order reverts back to OPEN status for offers accepted job if a talent later fails to start so the number of accepted offers is fewer than the number of open positions.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that Job Orders in Offers Pending Status should restrict the hospital from extending additional offers.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that job order status should be FILLED , where the number of talents in “On Assignment” Status is equal to the number of openings for the job order.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that job order status should be OFFERS ACCEPTED (new) when the number of talent in “offer accepted” status plus the number of talent in “Cleared to Start” status is equal to the number of total positions.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that job order status should be OFFERS ACCEPTED , when the number of talent in “offer accepted” status plus the number of talent in “Cleared to Start” status is equal to the number of total positions.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that job order status should be OFFERS ACCEPTED(Extension) , when the number of talent in “offer accepted” status plus the number of talent in “Cleared to Start” status is equal to the number of total positions.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that job order status should be OFFERS PENDING when the number of outstanding offers is equal to or less than the number of open positions for new jobs.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that job order status should be OFFERS PENDING when the number of outstanding offers is equal to the number of open positions for extension jobs.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that job order status should be OFFERS PENDING when the number of outstanding offers is equal to the number of open positions for new jobs.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that job order status should be OPEN where the number of outstanding offers is fewer than the number of open positions.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that the default page on job administration page is OPEN POSITIONS which lists all the currently open jobs, that are not closed (Status could be - Open, offer pending ,offer accepted).executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that the default page on job administration page is OPEN POSITIONS which lists all the currently open jobs, that are not closed.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that user should be able to apply column filter on Status column in job listing page.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that user should be able to filter by any value on all columns in job listing.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that user should be able to filter by any value on job details columns in job listing.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that when Hospital withdraw an Internal talent offer such that the number of outstanding offers is fewer than the number of open positions the Job Status should revert back to Open.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify that when Hospital withdraw an Vendor talent offer such that the number of outstanding offers is fewer than the number of open positions the Job Status should revert back to Open.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify the Active Hot Jobs quick filter in \"all job requisition\" tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify the Applicants quick filters in \"open positions\"tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify the Drafts quick filter in \"Pending approval & draft\" tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify the No Candidates quick filters in \"open positions\"tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.Verify the quick filters in \"open positions\"tab.executor": "Run", "Robot.VerifyJobStatusinJobsListing.robot.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager" } }

component.name: RunManager
component.selected: Robot.Verify that Job Orders in Offers Pending Status should restrict the hospital from extending additional offers

configuration.name: Verify that Job Orders in Offers Pending Status should restrict the hospital from extending additional offers

option.name: PARAMETERS
option.value: --test "DefinityRj.tests.VerifyJobStatusinJobsListing.Verify that Job Orders in Offers Pending Status should restrict the hospital from extending additional offers" .

configuration.name: Verify that job order status should be OFFERS PENDING when the number of outstanding offers is equal to the number of open positions for new jobs

option.name: PARAMETERS
option.value: --test "DefinityRj.tests.VerifyJobStatusinJobsListing.Verify that job order status should be OFFERS PENDING when the number of outstanding offers is equal to the number of open positions for new jobs" .

configuration.name: Verify that when Hospital withdraw an Internal talent offer such that the number of outstanding offers is fewer than the number of open positions the Job Status should revert back to Open

option.name: PARAMETERS
option.value: --test "DefinityRj.tests.VerifyJobStatusinJobsListing.Verify that when Hospital withdraw an Internal talent offer such that the number of outstanding offers is fewer than the number of open positions the Job Status should revert back to Open" .

configuration.name: Verify that when Hospital withdraw an Vendor talent offer such that the number of outstanding offers is fewer than the number of open positions the Job Status should revert back to Open

option.name: PARAMETERS
option.value: --test "DefinityRj.tests.VerifyJobStatusinJobsListing.Verify that when Hospital withdraw an Vendor talent offer such that the number of outstanding offers is fewer than the number of open positions the Job Status should revert back to Open" .

item.itemvalue: Robot.Verify that Job Orders in Offers Pending Status should restrict the hospital from extending additional offers
Robot.Verify that when Hospital withdraw an Vendor talent offer such that the number of outstanding offers is fewer than the number of open positions the Job Status should revert back to Open
Robot.Verify that when Hospital withdraw an Internal talent offer such that the number of outstanding offers is fewer than the number of open positions the Job Status should revert back to Open
Robot.Verify that job order status should be OFFERS PENDING when the number of outstanding offers is equal to the number of open positions for new jobs
